lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਤ ਡਰੈ ਜਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: so kat ddarai ji khasam samaarai |
lines.english: One who contemplates his Lord and Master - why should he be afraid?

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਰਿ ਡਰਿ ਪਚੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਵੇਚਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ddar ddar pache manamukh vechaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The wretched self-willed manmukhs are ruined through fear and dread. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: sir aoopar maat pitaa guradev |
lines.english: The Divine Guru, my mother and father, is over my head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: safal moorat jaa kee niramal sev |
lines.english: His image brings prosperity; serving Him, we become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: ek niranjan jaa kee raas |
lines.english: The One Lord, the Immaculate Lord, is our capital.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅਨ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeean kaa daataa pooran sabh tthaae |
lines.english: The Giver of all beings is totally pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kott kales mitteh har naae |
lines.english: Millions of pains are removed by the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹੋਵਤ ਪਰਗਾਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mil saadhasangat hovat paragaas |1|
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, we are illumined and enlightened. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਨ ਸਗਲਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran sagalaa dukh naasai |
lines.english: All the pains of birth and death are taken away

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਲਏ ਲੜਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis no aap le larr laae |
lines.english: He alone, whom the Lord has attached to the hem of His robe,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਬਾਸੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaa kai man tan baasai |2|
lines.english: from the Gurmukh, within whose mind and body the Lord dwells. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮਕਾਲ ਤੇ ਭਏ ਨਿਕਾਣੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jamakaal te bhe nikaane |3|
lines.english: They are freed from the Messenger of Death. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਈ ਭਗਤ ਜਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: seee bhagat ji saache bhaane |
lines.english: They alone are devotees, who are pleasing to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਹੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: daragah milai tisai hee jaae |
lines.english: obtains a place in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਗਲ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar sagal adhaar |
lines.english: He is within each and every heart, the Support of all.

lines.translit: naanak jaachai sant renaar |4|3|24|
lines.english: Nanak begs for the dust of the Saints. ||4||3||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਉਣੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: keemat kaun kahai beechaar |
lines.english: Who can contemplate and describe His value?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਦਰਬਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saachaa saahib sach darabaar |
lines.english: True is the Lord, and True is His Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਉ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa preetam prabh apune naam jpau har rang |1|
lines.english: Bestow Your Mercy, O my Beloved God, that I may chant the Lord's Name with love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਤੇਰਾ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ਤੂ ਜਨ ਕੈ ਹੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar baahar teraa bharavaasaa too jan kai hai sang |
lines.english: At home, and outside, I place my trust in You; You are always with Your humble servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪਨੇ ਕਾ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jan kau prabh apane kaa taan |
lines.english: God is the strength of His humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੂ ਕਰਹਿ ਕਰਾਵਹਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਾ ਮਸਲਤਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo too kareh karaaveh suaamee saa masalat paravaan | rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever You do, or cause to be done, O Lord and Master, that outcome is acceptable to me. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤੀ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਤੀ ॥੨॥੧॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: charan saran naanak daas har har santee ih bidh jaatee |2|1|25|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord's feet; from the Saints, he has learned this way of life. ||2||1||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਗਤਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਧਨੁ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: pat paramesar gat naaraaein dhan gupaal gun saakhee |
lines.english: The Transcendent Lord is my honor; the Lord is my emancipation; the glorious sermon of the Lord is my wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇ ਪਾਏ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਇ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath prabh te paae kantth laae gur raakhe |
lines.english: God has fulfilled all my desires. Holding me close in His embrace, the Guru has saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਬਿਸ੍ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kai man saachaa bisvaas |
lines.english: Those who have true faith in their minds,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਿ ਪੇਖਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਆਨਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਉਲਾਸੁ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pekh pekh suaamee kee sobhaa aanad sadaa ulaas | rahaau |
lines.english: continually behold the Glory of the Lord; they are forever happy and blissful. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਮਹਿ ਜਲਨਿ ਨ ਦੀਨੇ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਭਾਖੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar meh jalan na deene kinai na dutar bhaakhe |1|
lines.english: He has saved me from burning in the ocean of fire, and now, no one calls it impassible. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸਰਨਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸਾਖਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: charan saran pooran paramesur antarajaamee saakhio |
lines.english: I seek the Sanctuary of the feet of the Perfect Transcendent Lord, the Searcher of hearts; I behold Him ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਪੇਖਉ ਤਹ ਹਜੂਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਤਹੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh pekhau teh hajoor door katahu na jaaee |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see Him present; He is never far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਨਿ ਬੂਝਿ ਅਪਨਾ ਕੀਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਾ ਅੰਕੁਰੁ ਰਾਖਿਓ ॥੨॥੨॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: jaan boojh apanaa keeo naanak bhagatan kaa ankur raakhio |2|2|26|
lines.english: In His wisdom, the Lord has made Nanak His own; He has preserved the roots of His devotees. ||2||2||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਾਸਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: dhanaasaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dhanaasaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਮੈ ਮਨ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rav rahiaa sarabatr mai man sadaa dhiaaee |1|
lines.english: He is all-pervading, everywhere; O my mind, meditate on Him forever. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤ ਊਤ ਨਹੀ ਬੀਛੁੜੈ ਸੋ ਸੰਗੀ ਗਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: eet aoot nahee beechhurrai so sangee ganeeai |
lines.english: He alone is called your companion, who will not be separated from you, here or hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਜੋ ਨਿਮਖ ਮਹਿ ਸੋ ਅਲਪ ਸੁਖੁ ਭਨੀਐ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: binas jaae jo nimakh meh so alap sukh bhaneeai | rahaau |
lines.english: That pleasure, which passes away in an instant, is trivial. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਛਲ ਅਛੇਦ ਅਪਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਊਚਾ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: achhal achhed apaar prabh aoochaa jaa kaa roop |
lines.english: God is undeceiveable, impenetrable and infinite; His form is lofty and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੈ ਅਪਿਆਉ ਦੇਇ ਕਛੁ ਊਨ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: pratipaalai apiaau dee kachh aoon na hoee |
lines.english: He cherishes us, and gives us sustenance; He does not lack anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸੰਮਾਲਤਾ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saas saas samaalataa meraa prabh soee |2|
lines.english: With each and every breath, my God takes care of His creatures. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਹੁ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਿਤੁ ਤੁਮਹਿ ਅਰਾਧਾ ॥
lines.translit: saa mat dehu deaal prabh jit tumeh araadhaa |
lines.english: Bless me with such understanding, O Merciful Lord God, that I might remember You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਜਨ ਅਚਰਜ ਆਨੂਪੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jap jap kareh anand jan acharaj aanoop |3|
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the embodiment of wonder and beauty, His humble servants are in bliss. ||3||
